roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE #19019005,/SA1:MARIO GANT/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/SA2:WESTFIELD MALL, 865 MARKET ST, SF CA/CTORD:STAY OUT OF LOCATION/SAORD/NTW/LDPX:12-20-19/ACM/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/MO138572:19013621/CTORD:THAT THE GPS DEVICE BEREMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/
